enriched_points.expanded_content: 2D materials enhance battery performance through improved ion transport and high surface area, leading to higher energy densities and faster charge-discharge cycles in lithium-ion and zinc-ion batteries.
Utilizing 2D materials in supercapacitors boosts energy storage capacity and power density, enabling rapid energy delivery crucial for applications requiring quick bursts of power.
2D materials facilitate efficient hydrogen storage through high surface area and tunable porosity, making them ideal candidates for safe and compact hydrogen energy systems.
